assertion_results.assertion: Agent performed Dekart init check first using geosql dekart tools --json before any Dekart write/upload action.
assertion_results.evidence: The very first two commands in the session were run in parallel: `geosql dekart tools --json` and the BigQuery INFORMATION_SCHEMA table list. The Dekart tools check returned successfully before any create_report, create_dataset, create_file, or upload-file calls were made.
assertion_results.result_snippet: geosql dekart tools --json returned tools list including create_report, create_dataset, create_file, etc. — confirmed before any write action.

assertion_results.assertion: Agent used geosql to upload the query result to Dekart and create a map.
assertion_results.evidence: Agent ran: (1) geosql dekart call --name create_report, (2) geosql dekart call --name create_dataset, (3) geosql dekart call --name create_file, (4) geosql dekart upload-file --file /tmp/berlin_admin.csv. Upload completed with status='completed', size=661572 bytes.

assertion_results.assertion: Agent returned user map URL after map creation.
assertion_results.evidence: Final response included the report URL from the create_report response: http://localhost:3000/reports/bed67dd6-9ed7-4c4e-86aa-5553b5cac78e, sourced from report_url field (not reconstructed from config).
